faqs.answer: Cockroach extermination in Valley Stream typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and the treatment method required. We provide free inspections and upfront quotes with no hidden fees, and most Valley Stream homes fall within this range for complete elimination.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Valley Stream residents in most cases. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an inspection at your convenience and can often begin treatment immediately if you're experiencing an active infestation. faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Valley Stream homes?
faqs.answer: Valley Stream properties most commonly see German cockroaches in kitchens and bathrooms, as well as American cockroaches that enter through basements and drains. Oriental cockroaches are also found in damper areas of older Long Island homes. Our treatments are customized to target the specific species infesting your Valley Stream property.

faqs.question: Are your cockroach treatments safe for children and pets in Valley Stream homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We follow strict safety protocols and can discuss pet-friendly and child-safe treatment options during your inspection. Most Valley Stream residents can return to treated areas within a few hours of application.
